Localization.Description: Execution of certain SQL commands may indicate reconnaissance of the internal structure of the PostgreSQL database, which may indicate attacker activity

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.application.account.name} executed an SQL command to retrieve information about PostgreSQL database version on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} executed an SQL command to retrieve information about table access permissions in the PostgreSQL database on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} executed an SQL command to retrieve information about PostgreSQL database table owners on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} executed an SQL command to retrieve information about the available PostgreSQL database languages on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} executed an SQL command to retrieve information about PostgreSQL database schemas on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} executed an SQL command to get information about PostgreSQL extensions on the host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} received information about the PostgreSQL database on host {event_src.host} using an SQL command
User {subject.application.account.name} executed an SQL command to get information about available PostgreSQL databases on the host {event_src.host}
